channel.title: INfinance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INfinance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Micron’s stock falls on fears about Nvidia’s new chips, but investors may be overreacting
item.description: Some investors have been worried about Micron’s role serving Nvidia’s forthcoming chip lineup, but one analyst says he still likes the company’s posit...

item.title: Workday’s stock falls as CEO change sounds like ‘really bad news’ to this analyst
item.description: Investor sentiment toward software stocks is low, and now Workday is replacing a CEO who was known for having good sales relationships.

item.title: Kyndryl’s stock tumbles more than 50%. Here’s what’s gone wrong at the IT provider.
item.description: Shares lose more than half their value Monday following the disclosure of an accounting investigation and a big reset of the company’s financial guida...

item.title: Alphabet’s $15 billion bond deal may have a highly unusual component
item.description: As tech companies look to finance their hefty spending plans, they’ve been offering bonds with longer maturities.

item.title: Oracle’s stock soars as analyst predicts ‘pure upside’ ahead for the battered cloud provider
item.description: Oracle shares have been battered by OpenAI jitters and a broader software selloff, but one analyst argues the market has overcorrected.

item.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
item.description: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on ...

item.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
item.description: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

item.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
item.description: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia...

item.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

item.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
item.description: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
